scripts.test: node --test tests/core.test.js tests/app-contract.test.js tests/server.test.js tests/ai.test.js tests/naver-data.test.js tests/benchmark.test.js tests/quality.test.js tests/assemble.test.js tests/postlog.test.js tests/daily.test.js tests/connections.test.js tests/fold.test.js tests/integration.test.js tests/integration-app.test.js tests/history.test.js tests/photo-vault.test.js tests/backup.test.js tests/product-v2.test.js tests/a11y.test.js
scripts.check: node --check core.js && node --check history.js && node --check photo-vault.js && node --check benchmark.js && node --check quality.js && node --check assemble.js && node --check improve-ui.js && node --check postlog.js && node --check postlog-ui.js && node --check daily.js && node --check daily-ui.js && node --check fold-ui.js && node --check benchmark-ui.js && node --check backup.js && node --check product-v2.js && node --check ai.js && node --check naver-data.js && node --check server.js && node --check app.js
